    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "Q1 = df[\"TotalPrice\"].quantile(0.25)\n",
        "Q3 = df[\"TotalPrice\"].quantile(0.75)\n",
        "\n",
        "IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
        "\n",
        "lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "\n",
        "outliers = df[(df[\"TotalPrice\"] < lower_bound) | (df[\"TotalPrice\"] > upper_bound)]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Number of Outliers:\", len(outliers))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "aXjtse8XVlQz",
        "outputId": "e1928ab8-e645-4e57-bdb0-daa0b03ac83c"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Number of Outliers: 8\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "df = df[(df[\"TotalPrice\"] >= lower_bound) & (df[\"TotalPrice\"] <= upper_bound)]"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "54UDDjySVx17"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "Q1 = df[\"TotalPrice\"].quantile(0.25)\n",
        "Q3 = df[\"TotalPrice\"].quantile(0.75)\n",
        "IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
        "\n",
        "lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n",
        "\n",
        "outliers = df[(df[\"TotalPrice\"] < lower_bound) | (df[\"TotalPrice\"] > upper_bound)]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Remaining Outliers:\", len(outliers))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "7ES7es2OWACN",
        "outputId": "97dff9e3-431f-4f9b-95ab-30ca3258209a"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Remaining Outliers: 8\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,8))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(corr_matrix, annot=True, cmap=\"coolwarm\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Correlation Matrix\")\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "upper = corr_matrix.where(np.triu(np.ones(corr_matrix.shape), k=1).astype(bool))\n",
        "\n",
        "high_corr = [column for column in upper.columns if any(upper[column] > 0.80)]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(high_corr)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "schema = DataFrameSchema({\n",
        "      \"Quantity\": Column(int),\n",
        "          \"UnitPrice\": Column(float),\n",
        "              \"TotalPrice\": Column(float),\n",
        "                  \"ItemsInCart\": Column(int),\n",
        "                  })\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "\n",
        "columns = [\"Quantity\",\"UnitPrice\",\"ItemsInCart\",\"TotalPrice\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "df[columns] = scaler.fit_transform(df[columns])\n",
        "\n",
        "df.head()"
      ],
